perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man with pink-dyed hair sitting at a restaurant table, gesturing toward a large sizzling steak platter in front of him. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a piece of steak with a small black sign stuck into it. (3) The man picks up the piece of steak with his fork and takes a large bite, his expression shifting from excitement to a strained, chewing grimace. (4) Blue variety-show style graphics like a question mark and text overlays appear around him as he continues to struggle with the tough meat, eventually making a frustrated face toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop/electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone about the steak. (2) The sound of the sizzling plate is briefly audible beneath the music and speech. (3) As the man bites the steak, a slide-whistle sound effect plays, followed by the sound of him chewing and making sounds of mild struggle. (4) Cartoon-style boing and whistle sound effects are layered over his reaction as he finishes the bite and speaks in a slightly disappointed tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "這牛排真貼心 還有告示耶" (This steak is so thoughtful, there's even a sign) - excited tone. (2) Functional Text: "先吃這塊避免過熟 EAT FIRST!" (Eat this piece first to avoid overcooking) - informative tone. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: "貼心 貼心" (Thoughtful, thoughtful) - emphasizing his initial reaction. (4) Functional Text: "真的有點熟耶" (It really is a bit overdone) - observational tone. (5) Decorative Text: "真的硬硬der" (It's really tough/hard) - humorous tone. (6) Decorative Text: "北七嘎" (Idiot/Clumsy) - comedic self-deprecating tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Close-up of detail -> Eating Action -> Comedic Reaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing in the center frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young man with bright pink/blonde bleached hair wearing a black t-shirt with a white cartoon graphic of a cat or animal.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical busy steakhouse or teppanyaki restaurant with warm lighting, other tables, and red chair backs visible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a humorous 'expectation vs. reality' moment for social media. The creator highlights a 'thoughtful' sign on his steak that tells him to eat a specific piece first to avoid overcooking, but upon eating it, he discovers it is already very tough and overdone.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy reaction with variety-show text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form video editing tropes to emphasize a small daily irony.
